name: /prompt-ab non-dry-run writes a structured ab-result record to prompts eval-history directory
command: mkdir -p prompts/x prompts/eval-history/x && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && printf 'name: x\n' > prompts/x/v1.1.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-ab.sh" x v1.0.0 v1.1.0 --eval-stub n=50 --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f prompts/eval-history/x/ab-v1.0.0-v1.1.0.json ] && grep -q '"run_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"' prompts/eval-history/x/ab-v1.0.0-v1.1.0.json && echo ok 1>&2
